judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes the core washing action, but it omits required source-backed actions to apply sterile dressings if needed and to consult a skin specialist for any confirmed exposure. It also adds unsupported instructions and restrictions not present in the structured truth, including removing clothing, soap-and-water washing, avoiding neutralizing agents/ointments, and making escalation conditional on persistent irritation or extensive exposure.
